query:
INSERT IGNORE INTO expense_sub_categories (categoryId, name) 
SELECT id, 'Routine Checkup' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Surgery' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Emergency' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Lab Tests' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vet'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Mandatory' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vaccine'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Seasonal' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vaccine'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Treatment' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Vaccine'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Permanent Staff' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Labor'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Seasonal' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Labor'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Veterinary Labor' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Labor'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Feed Delivery' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Transport'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Animal Transport' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Transport'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Other' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Transport'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Equipment' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Repairs'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Fencing' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Repairs'
UNION ALL SELECT id, 'Infrastructure' FROM expense_categories WHERE name='Repairs';

INSERT IGNORE INTO feed_item_price_history (feedItemId, effectiveDate, pricePerUnit, notes)
SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 4.50, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Alfalfa'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 5.00, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Alfalfa Hay'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 12.00, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Milking Concentrate'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 10.50, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Concentrate 16%'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 9.50, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Concentrate 14%'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 6.00, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Corn'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 3.50, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Hay'
UNION ALL SELECT id, '2025-01-01', 8.00, 'Opening price' FROM feed_items WHERE name='Chicken Feed';
